framework.name: Tommy's 10x Revenue Increase from Pricing Change Alone
framework.description: Agency owner kept builds identical but switched from guessing to incentive-matched pricing. Revenue increased 10x in ~1 month. Demonstrates pricing strategy is higher-leverage than build optimization for early-stage operators.
framework.raw_quote: I switched to something called incentive match pricing, and I began to actually align my pricing with what the actual project was and required for the client. And then after doing that, I actually 10xed my agency revenue in around a month. And let me remind you, these were the exact same builds, same complexity, everything.

source.title: $50/Hour to $10K Agents: AI Voice Agency Pricing Masterclass
